variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS / cost of revenue appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore, D&A is assumed embedded in the selected COGS bucket ('Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental'), so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A / administrative expenses appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore, D&A is assumed embedded in the selected XSGA bucket ('Administrative Expenses'), so nothing should be added separately.
